title: ‘Will never happen’: North Korea rejects Quad’s call for denuclearisation
summary_full: North Korea has vehemently rejected the Quad's call for its denuclearisation, vowing "never" to give up its nuclear weapons. The foreign ministry accused the grouping of being a US tool and interfering in its affairs.  The Quad nations, including India, had reiterated their commitment to Pyongyang's denuclearisation and condemned its weapons programs.
